name: Adil Sheikh
title: Founder & Lead AI Architect
bio: Full-stack AI engineer specializing in production-grade AI systems. Designed and shipped 3 production AI voice platforms across healthcare, lending, and retail. Deep familiarity with LiveKit, multi-tenant compliance, and sub-second latency orchestration.

name: Priya Natarajan
title: Conversational AI Design Lead
bio: Former head of CX at a top-3 private bank. Designed IVR and chatbot flows for 40M+ customers. Native-fluent across Hindi, Tamil, Marathi. Brings deep understanding of vernacular enterprise UX.

name: Rohan Desai
title: Principal Backend Engineer
bio: 11 years scaling fintech backends at Razorpay, CRED, and Navi. Built the unified context layer for a top-5 insurer. Specialist in high-throughput, low-latency transactional systems.
education: B.Tech + M.Tech Computer Science, IIT Delhi

name: Ananya Iyer
title: Senior ML Engineer
bio: Built evaluation pipelines for two tier-1 banking chatbots. Published research on safety-aware LLM routing at NeurIPS. Expert in RAG architectures and LLM eval.

name: Vikram Seshadri
title: Security & Compliance Lead
bio: Led compliance delivery for two RBI-regulated AI deployments. Former internal auditor at HDFC. Deep familiarity with Indian regulatory landscape for financial services.

name: Meera Pillai
title: Site Reliability Engineer
bio: Operated 9-figure-scale transactional platforms with 99.97% uptime. Incident-commander certified. Built the on-call and observability stack for two high-growth fintechs.

name: Karthik Rao
title: Delivery Manager
bio: Delivered 11 enterprise banking programs on-time and on-budget. Expert in navigating large-enterprise governance and change-management processes.

name: Nikhil Menon
title: Senior Frontend Engineer
bio: Built three enterprise design systems used by 500+ engineers. Deep expertise in performant React and real-time UIs. Led the agent-desktop build for a top-3 Indian bank.
